sed security patches as of April 12th, 2005. See http://www.microsoft.com/technet/security/bulletin/ms05-apr.mspx for complete bulletin. Security patches defined by Microsoft as “critical” or “important” MUST be applied within 5 business days of noti

nt” MUST be applied within 5 business days of notification. Should there be active exploits, the time will be adjusted and users will be informed appropriately. Hosts unpatched after the defined time are subject to scanning and removal from the EECS
